mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary policy that reduces borrowing costs and boosts equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2.5% over 3 months signals central bank inaction, eroding real returns and depressing equity prices, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signal, or CPIAUCSL fails to correlate with returns (Pearson r < 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) indicates a tightening labor market, increasing corporate earnings potential and driving positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between PAYEMS and UNRATE shows no significant impact on returns (p > 0.1), or 5-day returns in triggered scenarios are negative.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth (GDPC1) combined with rising housing starts (HOUST) signals robust economic demand, creating positive momentum in equity markets over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between GDPC1 and HOUST fails to predict returns (p > 0.1), or 60-day returns in high-demand scenarios are negative.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates improving supply-side capacity, reducing inflationary pressures and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO fails to correlate with returns (Pearson r < 0.1), or 20-day returns in high-industrial production periods are negative.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts (HOUST) below 800k signal weak demand in the construction sector, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite low HOUST, or HOUST fails to correlate with returns (Pearson r < 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates strong consumer and business demand, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between RSAFS and HOUST shows no significant impact on returns (p > 0.1), or 20-day returns in high-demand scenarios are negative.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by FEDFUNDS above 4.5%, increase discount rates and reduce equity valuations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high FEDFUNDS, or FEDFUNDS fails to correlate with returns (Pearson r < 0.1).
